name: product-architect
description: Use when defining, refining, or documenting a {{project.name}} feature or bug before implementation, including requests to create a product {{ticketing.itemNoun}} or agree on UI requirements.

interface.short_description: Shape features and bugs into approved {{ticketing.itemNoun}}s
interface.default_prompt: Use $product-architect to define this {{project.name}} change and create an approved vertical {{ticketing.itemNoun}}.
